data.title: Gold Becomes The Whale Safe Haven As Bitcoin Takes A Back Seat
data.description:
A large investor shifted funds into tokenized gold this week, and Bitcoin felt the impact. Prices dipped while a whale quietly bought millions in XAUT, a gold-backed token, signaling a short-term move toward traditional hedges. Related Reading: Bitcoin Influencers Get Spotlight In X’s New ‘Starterpacks’ Whales Move Into Tokenized Gold According to on-chain trackers, one address moved $1. 53 million in USDC into Hyperliquid to buy XAUT
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/gold-becomes-the-whale-safe-haven-as-bitcoin-takes-a-back-seat/

data.title: GameStop Moves Entire Bitcoin Treasury to Coinbase, Raising Sale Concerns
data.description:
A transfer involving GameStop’s full Bitcoin position has put the company’s crypto treasury under close scrutiny. The firm has moved all 4,710 BTC to Coinbase Prime, a platform typically associated with institutional execution and large-scale selling activity rather than long-term custody. The Bitcoin was acquired in May last year for $504
source: https://www.ethnews.com/gamestop-moves-entire-bitcoin-treasury-to-coinbase-raising-sale-concerns/

data.title: ETHZilla Sells $114.5 Million in Ethereum to Invest in Real-World Assets
data.description: ETHZilla, a treasury firm specializing in Ethereum, has sold more than $114.5 million worth of ETH in recent months. According to NS3.AI, the company is reallocating its capital to purchase real-world assets, such as jet engines, with the intention of tokenizing them on blockchain platforms. This strategy highlights an increasing trend of integrating traditional assets with blockchain technology through tokenization.

data.description:

data.title: Meet David Bateman, the man who invested $1 billion into physical silver ahead of historic rally
data.description:

In a post on X, David said that he started accumulating in October 2024, grabbing 12. 69 million ounces, which is 1. 5% of the […]

data.title: 478,188 Americans Warned After Hackers Strike Government-Related Firm Handling Sensitive Personal Data
data.description:
Hackers have breached the systems of a government-related entity handling sensitive personal information, putting the data of 478,188 Americans at risk. According to a new notification filed with the Maine Attorney General’s office, the incident at Brittany N. Griffiths in Illinois happened in May of last year
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/24/478188-americans-warned-after-hackers-strike-government-related-firm-handling-sensitive-personal-data/

data.title: Cyberattack on Illinois Firm Exposes Personal Data of Thousands
data.description: A government-affiliated company in Illinois experienced a cyberattack in May last year, leading to the exposure of sensitive personal information of 478,188 Americans. According to NS3.AI, more than 284,000 of those affected are residents of Maine, triggering state-required breach notifications. Individuals impacted by the breach are encouraged to implement protective measures, including credit freezes and monitoring. Legal actions have been suggested as a means for potential compensation.

data.title: OpenAI Introduces Age Prediction on ChatGPT to Strengthen Youth Safety
data.description:
OpenAI is introducing an age-prediction feature for ChatGPT to identify users under 18 and automatically apply enhanced safety protections. The system analyzes account signals to block sensitive content, aiming to address ongoing criticism and legal concerns over teen safety. The post OpenAI Introduces Age Prediction on ChatGPT to Strengthen Youth Safety first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2026/01/24/openai-introduces-age-prediction-on-chatgpt-to-strengthen-youth-safety/
